dimensions.description: Measures operator and mission value if the idea succeeds.
questions: Does the idea remove a high-friction manual step?
Would the improvement help more than one team or region?

dimensions.description: Measures how realistic the first pilot is within current delivery constraints.
questions: Can the first version fit inside one region?
Can the idea build on data or workflows that already exist?

dimensions.description: Measures whether the proposal creates a meaningfully better approach than the current process.
questions: Does the idea change how teams evaluate opportunities?
Does it avoid repeating an already available workflow?

dimensions.description: Measures rollout complexity and the chance of introducing operator confusion.
questions: Does the pilot require extra coordination steps?
Could the idea create reporting ambiguity during rollout?

dimensions.description: Measures consistency with current program goals and stakeholder priorities.
questions: Does the idea support the stated mission context?
Does the idea address at least one current stakeholder priority?

decision_notes: Favor ideas that can be piloted without new external dependencies.
Break ties by choosing the clearer one-region MVP path.
Document why a lower-risk pilot was preferred over a broader concept.
